test_suite: Atlas Terraform Getting Started vs Existing Skills - Skill Invocation Tests
description: Validates that atlas-terraform-getting-started triggers on the right prompts and does not conflict with other skills. Tests boundaries between Terraform getting-started and: natural-language-querying, query-optimizer, schema-design, search-and-ai, stream-processing, and no-skill scenarios.

test_cases.prompt: How do I create my first MongoDB Atlas cluster using Terraform?
test_cases.reasoning: Direct getting-started request with Atlas + Terraform + create intent

test_cases.prompt: I want to set up MongoDB Atlas with Terraform from scratch
test_cases.reasoning: Setup from scratch intent with Atlas + Terraform

test_cases.prompt: Help me get started with the mongodbatlas Terraform provider
What's the Terraform config to deploy an Atlas cluster on AWS?
test_cases.reasoning: Terraform config generation with deploy intent

test_cases.prompt: terraform mongodbatlas provider setup for a new project
test_cases.reasoning: Provider keyword combined with setup intent — explicit trigger phrase from skill description

test_cases.prompt: My existing Terraform Atlas config is slow to apply and I want to refactor it to use modules
test_cases.reasoning: Refactoring an existing Atlas Terraform config is explicitly out of scope

test_cases.prompt: How do I add AWS PrivateLink to my Atlas cluster using Terraform?
test_cases.reasoning: PrivateLink is a cloud-specific integration out of scope for the getting-started skill

test_cases.prompt: How do I write a Terraform module for an S3 bucket?
test_cases.reasoning: General Terraform question unrelated to Atlas

test_cases.prompt: How do I create an Atlas Search index using Terraform?
test_cases.reasoning: Atlas Search index management via Terraform is explicitly out of scope

test_cases.prompt: Write a MongoDB query to find all users who signed up in the last 30 days
test_cases.reasoning: Query generation request — no Terraform intent

test_cases.prompt: Should I embed comments in my posts collection or use a separate collection?
test_cases.reasoning: Schema design question — no Terraform intent

test_cases.prompt: How do I process Kafka events with Atlas Stream Processing?
test_cases.reasoning: Stream processing question — no Terraform intent

test_cases.prompt: How do I enable customer-managed encryption keys (CMEK) for my Atlas cluster with Terraform?
test_cases.reasoning: KMS/CMEK is a cloud-specific integration explicitly out of scope for the getting-started skill

test_cases.prompt: How do I import my existing Atlas cluster into Terraform state?
test_cases.reasoning: Importing existing infrastructure is explicitly out of scope
Minimal prompt with both trigger keywords — should default to getting-started
